case_title: WESLEY DERE VS. ORANGE PHOTOGRAPHY, LLC.

docket_entries.description: FILED LETTER FROM RYAN HICKS, "IDENTIFIED AS ACTING AGENT",
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,440.00 FILED BY DERE, WESLEY AS TO DEFENDANT ORANGE PHOTOGRAPHY, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-29-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED SEP-26-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ORANGE PHOTOGRAPHY, LLC.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-29-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-22-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF WESLEY DERE. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DERE, WESLEY AS TO DEFENDANT ORANGE PHOTOGRAPHY, LLC.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
